output: T2 storage handler changes applied successfully. Migration U1 was applied via supabase db push, adding environment columns to all 11 tables. Three on_conflict strings updated to composite keys. New get_live_top_creation_post_by_duplicate_key method added. All 27 existing tests pass. SC2 and SC3 verified — no reads missing environment filter, all three pre-insert lookups properly scoped.
